overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a rocky coastal path past an abandoned graffiti-covered skate park, then continuing along the beach toward a hazy sunset over the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal path with bushes and ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a rocky coastal path with bushes on the left and ocean on the right

entered.detail: dense green bushes lining the left side of the coastal path
wooden utility pole with overhead wires running along the coast
calm blue ocean water extending to the horizon with distant landmass visible
uneven rocky and sandy ground forming the coastal trail
hazy mountain silhouette visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky coastal path with dense bushes on the left and the ocean visible to the right. The camera moves forward along the trail, passing a wooden utility pole, with hazy mountains visible in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned coastal skate park with graffiti-covered concrete

events.description: approaching abandoned concrete skate bowl with colorful graffiti and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking past an abandoned skate park, observing the graffiti-covered concrete bowl and surrounding palm trees

entered.detail: large concrete skate bowl with weathered surface and overgrown edges
tall palm trees standing near the abandoned skate structure
concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an abandoned skate park area featuring a concrete bowl covered in vibrant graffiti. Palm trees stand nearby as the camera curves around the structure, with the ocean still visible to the right and the utility pole receding into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with ocean buoys and breaking waves

events.description: camera turns right toward the ocean, focusing on the water and floating buoys

agents.ego_description: turning toward the ocean and walking along the rocky shoreline, looking out at the water

entered.detail: yellow and white buoys floating in the ocean marking the coastal area
rocky edge where the land meets the water with waves lapping against stones

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right toward the ocean, leaving the skate park behind. The view opens to the water with buoys visible in the distance, while the character walks along the rocky shoreline with waves visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach facing the setting sun with power lines

events.description: sun becomes visible ahead creating golden hour glare and warm atmospheric lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach toward the low sun, with power lines visible along the right side

entered.detail: series of wooden utility poles with power lines stretching along the beach
bright sun low on the horizon creating lens flare and golden lighting
distant trees and bushes on the elevated coastal bank

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the beach stretching ahead toward a bright golden sun low on the horizon. Power lines run along the right side of the frame while the ocean laps at the shore to the left. The warm sunlight creates a hazy atmosphere as the character continues walking along the sandy terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rocky coast that transforms from a secluded trail into a wide, sun-drenched beach. It begins by moving forward along a coastal path flanked by dense bushes and a wooden utility pole, with hazy mountains looming across the distant water. As the camera advances, the trail opens into an abandoned skate park where the view curves around a graffiti-covered concrete bowl and nearby palm trees. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, leaving the structures behind to follow the rocky shoreline past floating buoys in the ocean. Finally, the terrain transitions into a sandy beach stretching toward a bright golden sun low on the horizon, with power lines tracing the path under a warm, hazy light.
